## Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS, Windows, Linux]
- Browser (if applicable): [e.g. Chrome, Safari]
- Service/version: [e.g. ticket-service, api-gateway]
- Java version (if relevant): [e.g. 25]

## Additional context

Logs, screenshots, or any other information that might help.
